_backup_note: Snapshot of SyncView Calendar — Append Post (iA54ipMOybicmYBh) taken 2026-06-12 during Phase 1 prep of the Sheets→Supabase realtime migration (CALENDAR_REALTIME_MIGRATION.md), before any workflow edits. WRITES to Calendar_<slug>: appends a new row (operation=append) with an ALLOWED-column whitelist, generates id p_<ts36>_<rand> if absent, sets updated_at server-side. Duplicate-link guard: if a non-archived row already owns the incoming linear_issue_id, returns that row (deduped:true) instead of appending a twin. On the Phase 1 dual-write list — this workflow was MISSING from the migration doc's write list. No secrets in this workflow. n8n cloud's own workflow version history is the authoritative rollback path.
name: SyncView Calendar — Append Post

nodes.name: Read Link Twins
nodes.notes: Rows in this tab whose linear_issue_id equals the incoming one (falls back to __no_link__ sentinel when the incoming link is blank, so blank links never match). Feeds the duplicate-link guard.

nodes.name: Is Duplicate
nodes.notes: True (output 0): a live row already owns this linear_issue_id -> respond with the existing row, no append. False (output 1): normal append path.

parameters.jsCode:

return [{ json: { ok: true, post: j } }];
